verses.1: Then the LORD said to Job,
verses.2: “Will the faultfinder contend with the Almighty? Let him who rebukes God give an answer.”
verses.3: Then Job answered the LORD and said,
verses.4: “Behold, I am insignificant; what can I say in response to You? I put my hand on my mouth.
verses.5: “I have spoken once, and I will not reply; Or twice, and I will add nothing more. ”
verses.6: Then the LORD answered Job from the whirlwind and said,
verses.7: “Now tighten the belt on your waist like a man; I will ask you, and you instruct Me.
verses.8: “Will you really nullify My judgment? Will you condemn Me so that you may be justified?
verses.9: “Or do you have an arm like God, And can you thunder with a voice like His?
verses.10: “Adorn yourself with pride and dignity, And clothe yourself with honor and majesty.
verses.11: “Let out your outbursts of anger, And look at everyone who is arrogant, and humble him.
verses.12: “Look at everyone who is arrogant, and humble him, And trample down the wicked where they stand.
verses.13: “Hide them together in the dust; Imprison them in the hidden place.
verses.14: “Then I will also confess to you, That your own right hand can save you.
verses.15: “Behold, Behemoth, which I made as well as you; He eats grass like an ox.
verses.16: “Behold, his strength in his waist, And his power in the muscles of his belly.
verses.17: “He hangs his tail like a cedar; The tendons of his thighs are knit together.
verses.18: “His bones are tubes of bronze; His limbs are like bars of iron.
verses.19: “He is the first of the ways of God; Let his Maker bring His sword near.
verses.20: “Indeed the mountains bring him food, And all the animals of the field play there.
verses.21: “He lies down under the lotus plants, In the hiding place of the reeds and the marsh.
verses.22: “The lotus plants cover him with shade; The willows of the brook surround him.
verses.23: “If a river rages, he is not alarmed; He is confident, though the Jordan rushes to his mouth.
verses.24: “Can anyone capture him when he is on watch, Can anyone pierce his nose with barbs?
